The '''''Asteroid Dancer''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[YT-1500 freighter]] that came to [[Nova Station]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
